summary: Tightened qd audit report validation so findings[] entries must match the qd audit-report schema instead of accepting arbitrary array contents.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/audit.sh rejects findings[] items that are not objects with non-blank severity, title, evidence, observed, expected, and classification.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: validate_audit_findings requires each finding to be an object with required non-blank fields; non-object and blank-required-content negative smokes record expected failures.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/audit.sh rejects findings[].severity and findings[].classification values outside qd vocabulary.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Severity is constrained to P0 through P3 and classification is constrained to qd audit-report vocabulary; bad-severity and bad-classification negative smokes record expected failures.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/audit.sh rejects absolute or traversal findings[].path values when path is present.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Optional finding paths must be blank, null, or repo-relative without traversal; absolute-path, traversal-path, and non-string-path negative smokes record expected failures.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/audit.sh rejects non-positive or non-integer findings[].line values when line is present.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Optional finding lines must be positive integers; bad-line and non-integer-line negative smokes record expected failures.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Existing qd audit reports pass without weakening the contract.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-audit-finding-schema-contract/just-qd-reports-check.log records the stricter checker passing against the current report set.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, git diff --check, and temporary-copy negative smokes for malformed audit findings.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The evidence directory contains the required positive logs plus temporary-copy negative smokes for non-object, blank required content, bad severity, bad classification, bad path, and bad line cases.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; no product runtime or macOS-specific behavior is claimed.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; no product runtime, platform, capture, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, latency, or macOS-specific behavior is claimed.
